name: HWR_CURRENT_JOB_ITEM
description: This is HWR table to store current job item details.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key job id for this table

columns.Name: JOB_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: This is the job run id column for current job item table.

columns.Name: PARENT_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: This is the parent job id column for the current job item table.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This is the status column on current job item table.

columns.Name: HAS_STARTED
columns.Comments: This is the has started column on current job item table.

columns.Name: SCHEDULER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the scheduler id column on current job item table.

columns.Name: JOB
columns.Comments: This is the job column on current job item table.

columns.Name: APPLICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: This is the application of the current job item.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
